svg.title: Text-to-video pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a text prompt is transformed into a video through prompt parsing, diffusion-based frame generation, temporal consistency modelling, rendering, audio synthesis, and final export.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What makes a good text prompt for video generation?')
sendPrompt('How does a text encoder like CLIP process video prompts?')
sendPrompt('What is storyboard planning in AI video generation?')
sendPrompt('How does latent diffusion generate video frames?')
sendPrompt('How is audio generated alongside video in text-to-video?')
sendPrompt('What is temporal consistency in video generation?')
sendPrompt('What is frame interpolation and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('How does super-resolution upscale AI-generated video?')
sendPrompt('How are audio and video synchronised in generated content?')
g.text: Align waveform to frames, FFmpeg mux

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What colour grading is applied to AI-generated video?')
sendPrompt('What video formats can text-to-video systems export?')
